field.name: club_identifier
field.label: Club Identifier
field.description: The club identifier or URL for validation

field.name: season_id
field.label: Season
field.description: Select a season to import data for
field.query: SELECT id, CONCAT(IF(label != '', CONCAT(label, ' '), ''), start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0')) AS name FROM #__ttclub_seasons WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY start_year DESC, label ASC

field.name: half_season_id
field.label: Half-Season
field.description: Select a half-season (required for roster import)
field.query: SELECT hs.id, CONCAT(IF(s.label != '', CONCAT(s.label, ' '), ''), s.start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(s.start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0'), ' - ', CASE hs.half WHEN 1 THEN 'First Half' WHEN 2 THEN 'Second Half' END) AS name FROM #__ttclub_half_seasons hs INNER JOIN #__ttclub_seasons s ON s.id = hs.season_id WHERE s.published = 1 ORDER BY s.start_year DESC, s.label ASC, hs.half ASC

field.name: click_tt_url
field.label: click-tt.de URL
field.description: Paste a click-tt.de URL to import a parallel season (e.g., cup/Pokal data). No season selection required.
